raw_consumer_statement:
I purchased an item off of XXXX, an online auction site on XX/XX/year> I purchased an XXXX  XXXX FOR XXXX. I bought it from the seller XXXX ( XXXX XXXX ) off of XXXX. I used my American Express card for the transaction. 
I received the item XXXX and the item was not as described in the listing. The item was not functional and was not in the condition as promised, defective. I contacted the seller but the seller wouldnt respond. I started a claim with XXXX and XXXX told me to send the item back. All of a sudden, the seller started communicating with me and waiting me to lie to the manufacture and try to obtain warranty. I explained to the seller that the warranty is for the original owner which is him and not me. I am the second buyer of the item and the warranty would not apply to me. That I have documented between chat message of the seller and myself. I also bought this item as new and sealed which it was not and hence the reason of me returning this item. I used the pre-paid label that was sent to me via XXXX. The seller stated he received the item but it was different than what he sent me, which is a lie and fraud. I have proof that I sent the same item he sent to me back to him. The seller is committing retail fraud and I am the victim of their deceitful intentions. I have photos of the item with the serial number being mailed back to the seller. I contacted American Express and they refused to help me with my charge back even with the amount of proof I have of the seller lying and committing retail fraud and not issue me my refund and or charge back. 
I am filing this complaint with the CPFB to some help against American Express for ignoring this blatant seller and help me recoup my funds from a retail fraud that I have become the victim of. I filed a police report with the XXXX XXXX XXXX department on XX/XX/year>. I also filed a IC3 FBI Internet crime complaint/report on XX/XX/year>.
